_description: PDM25 V2 complete installation data — ELTON VW LT31 1976 | JSN 398
_query_examples: All PDM outputs: filter outputs array
Find all 2.5mm² wires: wires where mm2=2.5
What inputs feed the starter: outputs[id=O23].function

timers.label: BLINK TMR
timers.description: Blinker frequency — used by O5 (TURN-L) and O6 (TURN-R)

generic_functions.label: IGN ON
generic_functions.description: True when ignition switch terminal 15 is active (key in position II)

inputs.note: 4.7k+4.7k voltage divider. OFF≈2V, pos1≈6V(40%), pos2≈10V(70%), pos3≈12V(100%)
High beam stalk. Latching: one pull ON, next pull OFF
Direct from battery via brake light switch — works without ignition
Left indicator stalk. Stalk mechanism holds position mechanically
Park light switch. Via busbar (O1, always-on) — works without ignition
Wiper stalk pull-back position activates washer
NTC coolant temperature sensor. 1kΩ pull-up to C10. EMA=10 for noise filtering.
Active Low — horn button grounds the line. 10kΩ external pull-up near PDM pin A1. Fail-safe: broken cable = 12V (high) = horn OFF.
Fuel level sender (resistive). 100Ω pull-up to C10. EMA=10.
Gearbox reverse switch — direct from ignition via switch
Ignition switch terminal 50 — momentary start position. Used in O23 starter logic.
Ignition switch terminal 15 — key position II (run). Drives GF1.

outputs.note: Signal busbar — always on. Feeds all switch inputs (~10mA) + wiper park circuit (~1-2A)
O3 → N6 ballast resistor → ignition coil kl.15. Protected by 5A fuse.
Instant trip — safety critical. HS mode required.
Fuel pump. Stay On 2s for easy restart. RPi monitors F1 oil pressure and sends CAN disable when oil pressure lost with ignition on (B2 stall protection).

outputs.function: T1 Status AND (I6 Status OR I3 Status)

outputs.note: High beam right. Requires low beam R (O15) active + I2 high beam toggle latched.
Stay On 30s blows out residual heat after ignition off.
3s turn-on delay replaces J59 X-contact relay. Also enables O16 high beam.
Requires low beam O14 to be on AND I2 latched
Raspberry Pi 5 + CAN HAT. Always on for CAN monitoring.

O23 drives starter relay coil pin 85 (1.5mm², ~0.5A). Relay pin 30←BAT (16mm²), pin 87→solenoid kl.50 (16mm²), pin 86→GND. Stay On=0s — starter stops immediately when key released. Retries=0. RPi monitors F1 oil pressure and sends CAN disable when engine running (B5 interlock).
Dual-pin output (D3+D10). D3 feeds front park lights (M1/M3), D10 feeds rear park lights (M4/M2). Works WITHOUT ignition (I7 via busbar O1 which is always-on). Terminal 58 equivalent.

outputs.function: T1 Status AND (I5 Status OR I3 Status)
outputs.note: Dual-pin output (B3+B10). B3 feeds front left turn (M5), B10 feeds rear left turn (M6). Timer1 (400/400ms) creates flash. I3=hazard enables both sides simultaneously.

BUSBAR.label: Signalbusbar 12V
BUSBAR.description: Terminal block fed from O1 (always on, 3A). Distributes 12V to all switch inputs.

RPI.label: Raspberry Pi 5 + CAN HAT
RPI.description: CAN bus monitoring, sensor logging, RPi-based interlocks for fuel pump (B2) and starter (B5)

V.label: Torkarmotor
V.description: Wiper motor with internal cam-driven park switch

N6.label: Tändspolens ballastmotstånd
N6.description: Ignition coil ballast resistor (seriemotstånd). Fed by O3.

G2.label: Kyltempsensor
G2.description: Coolant temperature NTC sensor → PDM I11

F1.label: Oljetrycksgivare
F1.description: Oil pressure switch → RPi GPIO (used for B2/B5 interlocks)

E9.label: Fläktvred
E9.description: Blower speed switch. 4.7k+4.7k voltage divider → I1 analog

E22.label: Torkarspak
E22.description: Wiper/washer stalk. Also controls park circuit (busbar → 53a when in OFF position)

HORN_BTN.label: Signalhornsknapp
HORN_BTN.description: Horn button (via steering wheel slip ring)

STARTER_RELAY.label: Startrelä
STARTER_RELAY.description: Starter motor relay (70A+). Pin 85: O23 trigger (1.5mm²). Pin 86: chassis GND. Pin 30: BAT+ (16mm²). Pin 87: solenoid kl.50 (16mm²). Mount near battery/starter.

WIPER_JUMPER.label: Torkarparkkrets jumper
WIPER_JUMPER.description: External jumper 31b → 53 at wiper motor connector. Enables park return circuit.

wires.label: MAIN_BAT+
wires.description: Battery positive to isolator

wires.label: PDM.PWR.BAT+
wires.description: Isolator to PDM M8-stud (main output power, 8Nm)

wires.label: PDM.PWR.CTRL
wires.description: Isolator to PDM controller power pin C3 (always-on)

wires.label: PDM.GND.CHASSIS
wires.description: PDM chassis ground to point 12

wires.label: GND.BAT
wires.description: Battery negative to chassis point 1

wires.label: GND.ENGINE
wires.description: Engine block to chassis point 3

wires.label: PDM.ENG.GEN.B+
wires.description: Generator B+ to battery

wires.label: PDM.IN.IGNITION
wires.description: Ignition run signal to I16. Drives GF1.

wires.label: PDM.IN.START
wires.description: Ignition start signal (momentary) to I15. Used in O23 function.

wires.label: PDM.OUT.BUSBAR
wires.description: O1 to signal busbar terminal block (3A fuse, always-on)
Busbar to left indicator switch input
Busbar to right indicator switch input
Busbar to hazard button input
Busbar to park light switch input
Busbar to wiper stalk washer position
Busbar to wiper stalk fast position
Busbar to wiper stalk slow position
Busbar to 10kΩ pull-up for horn Active Low circuit
Busbar to E22 park trigger (when stalk in OFF, connects to V 53a)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.LOWBEAM-L
wires.description: O14 to left headlight low beam

wires.label: PDM.OUT.LOWBEAM-R
wires.description: O15 to right headlight low beam

wires.label: PDM.OUT.HIGHBEAM-L
wires.description: O16 to left headlight high beam

wires.label: PDM.OUT.HIGHBEAM-R
wires.description: O7 to right headlight high beam

wires.label: PDM.IN.HIGHBEAM
wires.description: High beam stalk to I2 (latching)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.PARK-F
wires.description: O24 pin D3 to front park lights (M1 left + M3 right)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.PARK-R
wires.description: O24 pin D10 to rear park lights (M4 left + M2 right)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.TURN-L-F
wires.description: O25 pin B3 to left front turn signal (M5)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.TURN-L-R
wires.description: O25 pin B10 to left rear turn signal (M6)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.TURN-R
wires.description: O6 to right front (M7) + right rear (M8) turn signals

wires.label: PDM.IN.TURN-L
wires.description: Left indicator stalk to I5

wires.label: PDM.IN.TURN-R
wires.description: Right indicator stalk to I6

wires.label: PDM.IN.HAZARD
wires.description: Hazard button to I3 (latching)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.BRAKE
wires.description: O4 to both brake lights (instant trip, HS mode)
Battery direct to brake light switch

wires.label: PDM.IN.BRAKE
wires.description: Brake switch to I4 (active regardless of ignition)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.REVERSE
wires.description: O19 to both reverse lights

wires.label: PDM.IN.REVERSE
wires.description: Gearbox reverse switch to I14

wires.label: PDM.OUT.HORN
wires.description: O13 to horn

wires.label: PDM.IN.HORN
wires.description: 10kΩ pull-up junction to I12 (Active Low)
Horn button output to chassis ground (via slip ring)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.WIPER.SLO
wires.description: O10 to wiper motor slow winding (kl.53)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.WIPER.FST
wires.description: O2 to wiper motor fast winding (kl.53b)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.WASHER
wires.description: O12 to washer pump

wires.label: PDM.OUT.WIPER.PARK
wires.description: External jumper 31b→53 at wiper motor connector — enables park return circuit
E22 in OFF position connects busbar 12V to motor 53a — triggers park return via cam switch

wires.label: PDM.IN.WIPER.FST
wires.description: E22 fast position to I9

wires.label: PDM.IN.WIPER.SLO
wires.description: E22 slow position to I10

wires.label: PDM.OUT.BLOWER
wires.description: O11 to cabin blower motor (PWM controlled)

wires.label: PDM.IN.BLOWER
wires.description: E9 blower switch via 4.7k+4.7k voltage divider to I1 (analog)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.FUEL
wires.description: O5 to fuel pump

wires.label: PDM.OUT.IGNITION
wires.description: O3 to ignition ballast resistor input (5A PDM protection)

wires.label: PDM.ENG.COIL.N6
wires.description: Ballast resistor output to ignition coil primary positive

wires.label: PDM.ENG.COIL.T1
wires.description: Ignition coil primary negative to distributor points (green tape — signal cable, not PDM output)

wires.label: PDM.OUT.STARTER
wires.description: O23 to starter relay coil pin 85 (1.5mm², ~0.5A coil current)

wires.label: PDM.ENG.BAT→START
wires.description: Battery direct to starter motor terminal 30 (heavy cable, not via PDM)

wires.label: PDM.ENG.BAT→RELAY30
wires.description: Battery direct to starter relay pin 30 (heavy cable for solenoid current)

wires.label: PDM.ENG.RELAY87→SOL
wires.description: Starter relay pin 87 to starter solenoid kl.50 (16mm², carries 30-60A inrush)

wires.label: GND.STARTER.RELAY
wires.description: Starter relay coil ground pin 86 to chassis/engine block

wires.label: PDM.OUT.RADIO.MEM
wires.description: O18 (always-on) to radio memory power

wires.label: PDM.OUT.RADIO.ACC
wires.description: O20 (ignition-on) to radio ACC power

wires.label: PDM.OUT.RPI
wires.description: O21 (always-on, 2s soft start) to Raspberry Pi 5

wires.label: PDM.OUT.USB12V
wires.description: O22 (ignition-on) to 12V USB outlet

wires.label: PDM.CAN.H
wires.description: CAN-H twisted pair to RPi CAN HAT

wires.label: PDM.CAN.L
wires.description: CAN-L twisted pair to RPi CAN HAT

wires.label: INST.SENS.OIL
wires.description: Oil pressure switch to RPi GPIO. Used for B2 (fuel pump stall) and B5 (starter interlock) logic.

wires.label: INST.SENS.COOL.LVL
wires.description: Coolant level switch to RPi GPIO

wires.label: PDM.IN.COOLANT
wires.description: Coolant NTC via 1kΩ pull-up to C10 5V → I11 analog

wires.label: PDM.IN.FUEL.LVL
wires.description: Fuel sender via 100Ω pull-up to C10 5V → I13 analog

wires.label: GND.REAR.BUS
wires.description: Rear ground bus to chassis point 15

wires.label: GND.REAR.BRAKE-L
wires.description: Left brake light to rear ground bus

wires.label: GND.REAR.BRAKE-R
wires.description: Right brake light to rear ground bus

wires.label: GND.REAR.REV-L
wires.description: Left reverse light to rear ground bus

wires.label: GND.REAR.REV-R
wires.description: Right reverse light to rear ground bus

wires.label: GND.REAR.PARK-L
wires.description: Left rear park light to rear ground bus

wires.label: GND.REAR.PARK-R
wires.description: Right rear park light to rear ground bus

wires.label: GND.REAR.TURN-L
wires.description: Left rear indicator to rear ground bus

wires.label: GND.REAR.TURN-R
wires.description: Right rear indicator to rear ground bus

power.description: BAT → S_ISO → PDM M8-stud (32mm²) + C3 (4mm²). Ground: PDM C7 → chassis.

ignition_detect.description: S7 kl.15 → I16/C1. Drives GF1 (IGN ON). GF1 used by O3, O11, O14, O15, O20, O22, O23, O25.

start_signal.description: S7 kl.50 (momentary start) → I15/C2. Used in O23 function: GF1 AND I15 Status.

busbar.description: O1/C6 → 9-position terminal block (3A). Always on. Feeds all switch inputs + wiper park return path.

headlights.description: O14 → L1 56a (low beam L, 3s delay). O15 → L2 56a (low beam R, 3s delay). O16 → L1 56b (high beam L, O14+I2). O7 → L2 56b (high beam R, O15+I2). I2 latching.

park_lights.description: O24 dual-pin: D3 → front park (M1+M3), D10 → rear park (M4+M2). Function: I7 Status. Works WITHOUT ignition.

turn_signals.description: O25 dual-pin: B3 → TURN-L front (M5), B10 → TURN-L rear (M6). O6 → TURN-R (M7+M8). Function: T1(400/400ms) AND (I5/I6 OR I3). I3 hazard enables both.

brake_lights.description: BAT → BRAKE_SW → I4. O4 → M9+M10. Instant trip. Works without ignition.

horn.description: I12 Active Low. 10kΩ pull-up from busbar. Button grounds line. O13 → H1. Fail-safe: open cable = horn OFF.

wipers.description: O10 (slow) + O2 (fast) → wiper motor. O12 → washer pump. Park: external jumper 31b→53 + E22-AV→53a.

blower.description: E9 switch via 4.7k+4.7k divider → I1 analog. O11 PWM to V2. GF1 AND I1>1V. Stay On 30s.

fuel_pump.description: O5 → G6. Function: GF1. Stay On 2s. RPi CAN stall interlock (B2): disables O5 when F1 GPIO LOW.

ignition_coil.description: O3/C4 → N6 ballast resistor → coil kl.15. 5A fuse. N coil kl.1 → distributor (signal cable, green tape).

starter.description: O23 (1.5mm²) → starter relay coil pin 85. Relay pin 30 ← BAT (16mm²). Relay pin 87 → solenoid kl.50 (16mm²). Relay pin 86 → chassis GND. BAT direct to motor kl.30 (16mm²). GF1 AND I15 Status. Stay On 0s.

radio.description: O18 (always-on) → radio memory. O20 (GF1) → radio ACC.

rpi_power.description: O21 (always-on, 2s soft start) → RPi 5. O22 (GF1) → USB outlet.

can_bus.description: PDM C8/C9 → RPi CAN HAT. 250kbps. PDM internal termination ON. Check RPi HAT for built-in 120Ω before adding external.

sensors.description: G2 coolant NTC → I11 (1kΩ/5V). G fuel → I13 (100Ω/5V). F1 oil pressure → RPi GPIO. F66 coolant level → RPi GPIO.

ground_rear.description: All rear lights ground via rear bus to chassis point 15.
